name: Almond Macaroons
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. In a deep bowl, beat egg whites on low speed of an electric mixer until frothy.
3. Beat on high speed until stiff.
4. Gradually beat in sugar and then almond extract.
5. Fold in wheat germ.
6. Drop mixture by 1/2 teaspoonsful onto a cookie sheet sprayed with nonstick cooking spray and lightly dusted with flour.
7. Reduce temperature to 200°F.
8. Bake for 1 hour.
9. Turn off heat and leave cookies in oven to cool.
Makes 10 servings, 5 cookies each.
